cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when David could have gone to the football field. So, the question is asking between what times he could have gone, and we have several statements from different people about where David was at different times. First, let's list out all the given information: 1. David woke up at 5am. So that's his starting time. 2. Steven saw David buying a phone from 5am to 6am. So that's 5-6am. 3. Kimberly saw David taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 6am to 8am. So 6-8am. 4. Betty saw David working out at the gym from 9am to 12pm. 9-12pm. 5. Lisa saw David driving to the water park from 12pm to 3pm. 12-3pm. 6. William saw David sitting on a rooftop from 3pm to 10pm. 3-10pm. 7. The football field was closed after
